title: Austin Move
html: Stub. Yahir's Sept-2025 solo move from Oregon → Austin (2,090 miles / 31-hour drive). Articulated in July gut check, realized in Sept arrival doc. Originally planned with Cam Jipp as co-mover; Cam stayed behind.
